text: AWS Managed Policy: CloudWatchOpenSearchDashboardsFullAccess. Statement 1:   Purpose: CloudWatchOpenSearchDashboardsIntegration.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: logs:ListIntegrations, logs:GetIntegration, logs:DeleteIntegration, logs:PutIntegration, logs:DescribeLogGroups, opensearch:ApplicationAccessAll, iam:ListRoles, iam:ListUsers.   Resources: *. Statement 2:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsOpensearchReadAPIs.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: aoss:BatchGetCollection, aoss:BatchGetLifecyclePolicy, es:ListApplications.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com. Statement 3:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsOpensearchCreateServiceLinkedAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole.   Resources: arn:aws:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/opensearchservice.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonOpenSearchService.   Condition: StringEquals iam:AWSServiceName = opensearchservice.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com. Statement 4:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsObservabilityCreateServiceLinkedAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole.   Resources: arn:aws:iam::*:role/aws-service-role/observability.aoss.amazonaws.com/AWSServiceRoleForAmazonOpenSearchServerless.   Condition: StringEquals iam:AWSServiceName = observability.aoss.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com. Statement 5:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsCollectionRequestAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: aoss:CreateCollection.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:RequestTag/CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards.   Condition: ForAllValues:StringEquals aws:TagKeys = CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration. Statement 6:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsApplicationRequestAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: es:CreateApplication.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:RequestTag/OpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards.   Condition: ForAllValues:StringEquals aws:TagKeys = OpenSearchIntegration. Statement 7:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsCollectionResourceAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: aoss:DeleteCollection.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceTag/CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards. Statement 8:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsApplicationResourceAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: es:UpdateApplication, es:GetApplication.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceTag/OpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards. Statement 9:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsCollectionPolicyAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: aoss:CreateSecurityPolicy, aoss:CreateAccessPolicy, aoss:DeleteAccessPolicy, aoss:DeleteSecurityPolicy, aoss:GetAccessPolicy, aoss:GetSecurityPolicy.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringLike aoss:collection = cloudwatch-logs-*.   Condition: StringLike aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com. Statement 10:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsAPIAccessAll.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: aoss:APIAccessAll.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringLike aoss:collection = cloudwatch-logs-*. Statement 11:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsIndexPolicyAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: aoss:CreateAccessPolicy, aoss:DeleteAccessPolicy, aoss:GetAccessPolicy, aoss:CreateLifecyclePolicy, aoss:DeleteLifecyclePolicy.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringLike aoss:index = cloudwatch-logs-*.   Condition: StringLike aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com. Statement 12:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsDQSRequestQueryAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: es:AddDirectQueryDataSource.   Resources: arn:aws:opensearch:*:*:datasource/cloudwatch_logs_*.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:RequestTag/CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards.   Condition: ForAllValues:StringEquals aws:TagKeys = CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration. Statement 13:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsStartDirectQueryAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: opensearch:StartDirectQuery, opensearch:GetDirectQuery.   Resources: arn:aws:opensearch:*:*:datasource/cloudwatch_logs_*. Statement 14:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsDQSResourceQueryAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: es:GetDirectQueryDataSource, es:DeleteDirectQueryDataSource.   Resources: arn:aws:opensearch:*:*:datasource/cloudwatch_logs_*.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceTag/CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards. Statement 15:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsPassRoleAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: iam:PassRole.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringLike iam:PassedToService = directquery.opensearchservice.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringLike aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com. Statement 16:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsAossTagsAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: aoss:TagResource.   Resources: arn:aws:aoss:*:*:collection/*.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceTag/CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards.   Condition: ForAllValues:StringEquals aws:TagKeys = CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration. Statement 17:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsEsApplicationTagsAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: es:AddTags.   Resources: arn:aws:opensearch:*:*:application/*.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceTag/OpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: ForAllValues:StringEquals aws:TagKeys = OpenSearchIntegration. Statement 18:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsEsDataSourceTagsAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: es:AddTags.   Resources: arn:aws:opensearch:*:*:datasource/*.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceTag/CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration = Dashboards.   Condition: StringEquals aws:CalledViaFirst = logs.amazonaws.com.   Condition: ForAllValues:StringEquals aws:TagKeys = CloudWatchOpenSearchIntegration.

AWS Managed Policy: AmazonS3ObjectLambdaExecutionRolePolicy. Statement 1:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: logs:CreateLogGroup, logs:CreateLogStream, logs:PutLogEvents, s3-object-lambda:WriteGetObjectResponse.   Resources: *.

AWS Managed Policy: AmazonS3OutpostsFullAccess. Statement 1:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: s3-outposts:*.   Resources: *. Statement 2:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: datasync:ListTasks, datasync:ListLocations, datasync:DescribeTask, datasync:DescribeLocation*.   Resources: *. Statement 3:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: ec2:DescribeVpcs, ec2:DescribeSubnets, ec2:DescribeSecurityGroups, ec2:DescribeNetworkInterfaces.   Resources: *. Statement 4:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: outposts:ListOutposts, outposts:GetOutpost.   Resources: *.

AWS Managed Policy: AmazonS3OutpostsReadOnlyAccess. Statement 1:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: s3-outposts:Get*, s3-outposts:List*.   Resources: *. Statement 2:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: datasync:ListTasks, datasync:ListLocations, datasync:DescribeTask, datasync:DescribeLocation*.   Resources: *. Statement 3:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: ec2:DescribeVpcs, ec2:DescribeSubnets, ec2:DescribeSecurityGroups, ec2:DescribeNetworkInterfaces.   Resources: *. Statement 4:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: outposts:ListOutposts, outposts:GetOutpost.   Resources: *.

AWS Managed Policy: AWSLambdaDynamoDBExecutionRole. Statement 1:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: dynamodb:DescribeStream, dynamodb:GetRecords, dynamodb:GetShardIterator, dynamodb:ListStreams, logs:CreateLogGroup, logs:CreateLogStream, logs:PutLogEvents.   Resources: *.

AWS Managed Policy: AWSLambdaSQSQueueExecutionRole. Statement 1:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: sqs:ReceiveMessage, sqs:DeleteMessage, sqs:GetQueueAttributes, logs:CreateLogGroup, logs:CreateLogStream, logs:PutLogEvents.   Resources: *.

AWS Managed Policy: CloudWatchLambdaApplicationSignalsExecutionRolePolicy. Statement 1:   Purpose: CloudWatchApplicationSignalsXrayWritePermissions.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: xray:PutTraceSegments.   Resources: *.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceAccount = ${aws:PrincipalAccount}. Statement 2:   Purpose: CloudWatchApplicationSignalsLogGroupWritePermissions.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: logs:CreateLogGroup, logs:CreateLogStream, logs:PutLogEvents.   Resources: arn:aws:logs:*:*:log-group:/aws/application-signals/data:*.   Condition: StringEquals aws:ResourceAccount = ${aws:PrincipalAccount}.

AWS Managed Policy: CloudWatchLambdaInsightsExecutionRolePolicy. Statement 1:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: logs:CreateLogGroup.   Resources: *. Statement 2:   Effect: Allow.   Actions: logs:CreateLogStream, logs:PutLogEvents.   Resources: arn:aws:logs:*:*:log-group:/aws/lambda-insights:*.

AWS Managed Policy: CloudWatchLogsFullAccess. Statement 1:   Purpose: CloudWatchLogsFullAccess.   Effect: Allow.   Actions: logs:*, cloudwatch:GenerateQuery, cloudwatch:GenerateQueryResultsSummary, observabilityadmin:GetS3TableIntegration, observabilityadmin:ListS3TableIntegrations, observabilityadmin:ListTelemetryPipelines.   Resources: *.
